timelines.name: The Great War of Verdana
timelines.description: Chronicles the 40-year war between the Verdana Alliance and the Northern Void. The decisive Battle of Verdana determines the fate of the continent's memory reserves.

timelines.name: Architect Chen's Ascent
timelines.description: Documents the rise of Mira Chen from street archivist to lead Architect of the Memory Lattice. Contradictory biographical records threaten the coherence of her entire lineage.

timelines.name: The Forgetting Plague
timelines.description: The epidemic that erased all memory of the coastal cities within a single generation. 12 divergent branches record wildly different causes: plague, void incursion, or deliberate erasure.

timelines.name: Foundation of the Last City
timelines.description: The founding of Ω-7, the Last Forgotten City, and the installation of the Memory Loom as its guardian. The only timeline currently at near-full integrity.

timelines.name: Void Core Awakening
timelines.description: The growing resonance inside the Void Core that is amplifying paradox echo signals across all connected sectors. Immediate containment required.

timelines.name: The Cartographers' Rebellion
timelines.description: Mapmakers who discovered that erased places could be re-drawn into existence revolted against the Archivist Order, triggering a 20-year schism.

timelines.name: The Song of Remembered Stars
timelines.description: A period of rare prosperity when the Memory Loom sang in harmony with the stars. Astronomical events were directly woven into public memory.

timelines.name: Collapse of the Northern Archives
timelines.description: When the great Northern Archives collapsed during the Void Surge, thousands of years of accumulated memory were lost in hours. Cascade risk now active.

timelines.name: The Quiet Restoration
timelines.description: The gradual healing period after the First Forgetting, when volunteer Archivists worked in secret to restore fragments lost during the initial collapse.

timelines.name: Birth of the Memory Markets
timelines.description: When memory fragments began to be traded as commodities, an underground economy emerged that ultimately weakened the Loom's integrity in several sectors.
keyFigures: Trader Fen of the South Markets

timelines.name: The Dual Sovereignty Treaty
timelines.description: The historic treaty between the Archivist Order and the Void Wardens that established the current zone demarcations and memory preservation protocols.

timelines.name: The Last Signal
timelines.description: A single-thread timeline that seems to be transmitting a distress signal from the future — from a version of the Last City that no longer exists.
